scenarios.description: charset(html syntax) removes all obsolete meta[name=charset] when multiple present and appends or updates only one meta[charset]
scenarios.precondition: doc.updateMetaCharsetElement(true), default syntax (html), head contains two meta[name=charset] elements
scenarios.expectedResult: Exactly one meta[charset] present with correct charset, no meta[name=charset] elements remain
pseudocode: TEST TC11 html multiple obsolete removal

scenarios.description: charset(xml syntax) updates existing XmlDeclaration missing encoding but having version attr to insert encoding and preserve version
scenarios.path: B0→B3(xml)→B7(node instanceof XmlDeclaration && name=='xml')→B8(set encoding)→B9(if has version skip version attr)
scenarios.precondition: doc.updateMetaCharsetElement(true), syntax=xml, childNodes stubbed with XmlDeclaration("xml") having only version="2.0"
scenarios.expectedResult: XmlDeclaration retains version="2.0" and has encoding attribute set to target charset
pseudocode: TEST TC12 xml existing version-only declaration
// stub first child as XmlDeclaration with version only
reflect set doc.childNodes to list containing XmlDeclaration("xml", false).attr("version","2.0");
